heroInsight: Carousel posts are reinforcing their dominance with a 48% share of content and a high engagement score of 1060, showing 2.5x better save and DM share rates compared to static posts.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are leading the charge with high engagement and save rates, making them the go-to format for building deeper audience interaction.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels are maintaining relevance with their short, engaging format, crucial for quick consumption and high DM share value.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are thriving due to their interactive nature and ability to engage users with swipe-through content, leading to higher save rates.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories hold steady as a key format for real-time engagement and behind-the-scenes content, crucial for maintaining audience interest.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are seeing less engagement compared to dynamic formats, but still useful for quick, impactful messages.

critical: DM shares = 3-5x more valuable than likes. Focus on shareable content.
Saves = 25% of ranking power. Encourage save actions in captions.
First 3 seconds retention = everything for Reels. Hook viewers immediately.
Originality score: 10+ reposts in 30 days = shadowbanned from recommendations.
Raw, real human content > polished AI-generated. Show authenticity.
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM — 40% higher save rates in gym demographic.
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels — drives collection adds.
Create Reels with a strong first 3 seconds to boost retention and reach.
Encourage DM shares by creating meme-style content that resonates.
Leverage trending audio in Reels to tap into the algorithm's favoring of music.

tiktokCrossover.summary: Emerging TikTok trends like #musclebuilding and #strengthtraining are not yet fully capitalized on IG, offering fresh opportunities.
